headline: Nvidia says its AI data center design runs hotter to use a lot less water
summary: Nvidia's new Rubin data center design aims to drastically cut water and power consumption. The fully liquid-cooled system operates at higher temperatures. This design addresses public concerns over data center environmental impact.

headline: Valve describes just how brutal RAM negotiations are in 2026
summary: Valve's Steam Machine is priced at $1,049 (512GB) and $1,349 (2TB) without bundled controllers. High costs are due to Valve not subsidizing hardware. The company cites an ongoing component crisis as a major factor.

headline: AI is cursing renters with the promise of impossible homes
summary: AI-generated virtual staging creates misleading rental listings. Renters often find actual apartments don't match the attractive online images. This leads to frustration for those seeking affordable and spacious homes.

headline: The Apple Watch SE 3 is just $199 for Prime Day
summary: The Apple Watch SE 3 is available for an all-time low price of $199 on Prime Day. This model offers significant upgrades, including an always-on display and new gestures. The deal makes the SE 3 an exceptionally good value.

headline: Powerpuff Girls Movie in the Works at Warner Bros. Animation
summary: Warner Bros. Animation is developing a new animated Powerpuff Girls movie. The film aims to reunite Blossom, Bubbles, and Buttercup. This project marks a return for the beloved cartoon trio.

headline: Meccha Chameleon Players Are Recreating the Mona Lisa as the Hide-and-Seek Paint Game Passes 7 Million Sales
summary: Hide-and-seek paint game Meccha Chameleon has surpassed 7 million sales. Players are showcasing extreme creativity in their hiding spots. Some users are even recreating famous artworks like the Mona Lisa in-game.

headline: GTA 6 Fans Spot Tommy Vercetti Easter Egg Over a Year After Trailer 2's Release
summary: Grand Theft Auto 6 fans have discovered a hidden Tommy Vercetti Easter egg. The subtle reference was found in the game's second trailer. Vercetti is the iconic protagonist from GTA: Vice City.

headline: Tom Holland and Zendaya Are Huge Fans of PlayStation's Spider-Man Games, Insomniac Invites Them for Studio Tour
summary: Actors Tom Holland and Zendaya are avid fans of Insomniac Games' Spider-Man titles. Insomniac Games has extended an invitation for them to tour the studio. The Spider-Man movie stars expressed their enjoyment of the PlayStation games.

headline: Labour MPs mull leadership challenge to prevent Burnham 'coronation'
summary: Labour MPs are considering leadership bids to challenge Andy Burnham. The move aims to ensure policy ideas are thoroughly debated in a contest. Two senior party figures are reportedly weighing their options to run.

headline: Chris Mason: Questions multiply for the man tipped to replace Starmer
summary: BBC's political editor Chris Mason notes growing scrutiny on Andy Burnham. Burnham is widely considered a leading candidate to succeed Keir Starmer. He faces increasing pressure to detail how he will fulfill his policy promises.

headline: UK set for hottest June day on record as searing heat continues
summary: The UK is poised for potentially its hottest June day ever recorded. Extreme heatwave conditions are intensifying across parts of England and Wales. The Met Office has issued a rare red warning for extreme heat.

headline: Can you refuse to work or send your kids to school during a heatwave?
summary: The article clarifies legal rights regarding work and school during heatwaves. It provides guidance as temperatures significantly increase. Information covers the ability to refuse work or send children to school in extreme heat.
